sum: A high-converting landing page for inbound travelers. Translates the 'earned on foot' brand value into professional English copy, effectively bridging general interest to specific island guides.
ap: Strategic internal linking to localized hotel and destination guides. The layout minimizes friction for international users seeking trusted, first-hand information.
an: Excellent semantic structure. The meta description and hero copy use evocative language that resonates with the 'slow travel' and 'adventure' personas.
ao: Poised to capture 'hidden gem' and 'off the beaten path' search intent for Japan. Strong technical SEO foundation with correct dual-language mapping.
memo: Launched May 2026. Tailored for the inbound market with a focus on 'Field-tested' credibility. Crucial hub for directing traffic to monetization-heavy island pages.

quality.title: Guide to Japan’s Remote Islands | Miyako, Ishigaki, Amami | RITOTABI
quality.seasonalRisk: Summer to early autumn typhoons can disrupt travel plans; this should be considered in conversion monitoring.
strengths: High-quality English localization that maintains the brand's 'earned on foot' expertise
Seamless navigation between language versions via correct hreflang implementation
Strong visual storytelling using original high-resolution imagery
Effective FAQ section addressing common inbound traveler concerns

issues.text: Yoron Island content is currently hidden in the EN version (commented out), which limits the 'complete guide' feel compared to the JP version.
